# MedHelp

> MedHelp is a secure portal for doctors and patients to manage appointments, prescriptions, visits, and patient records.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Doctor and patient sign-in plus the main dashboard.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy-policy): How MedHelp collects, uses, and safeguards user data.
- [Terms of Service](/terms-of-service): The agreement that governs use of MedHelp.
